title: Kospi tanks 9% in just two sessions! What’s causing bloodbath in 2026’s top market?

title: Exclusive | Why BSE wants options traders to think beyond the next expiry
summary: After successfully reviving Sensex derivatives, BSE CEO Sundararaman Ramamurthy is now focused on shifting traders from weekly options to longer-dated contracts.
